blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 8" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
